# **_Longevity Clinic_** Marketing & Ad Agency

Longevity clinics focused on attracting more patients seeking age optimization and wellness services will benefit from our ability to build awareness of their practice and cutting-edge treatments, drive qualified traffic, generate high-value leads, and produce more consultations.

## Who We Are

Founded in 2010, ADvance Media is a full-service advertising agency that leverages data and technology to help longevity and wellness practices grow. Our deep understanding of the longevity medicine industry and our proven track record of helping other practices streamlines the entire growth process, leading to more patient acquisitions at a faster pace.

ADvance Media has been a proud member of the Inc 5000, which recognizes the 5,000 fastest-growing, privately held companies in the U.S., since 2020.

We have offices in Charleston, SC, and Los Angeles, CA, and we serve clients throughout the U.S. and abroad. You can learn more about our agency and our culture here.

## What We Do

Every longevity practice wants to grow, but growth without a strong brand foundation is not sustainable. ADvance Media will expertly build you a rock-solid base that encompasses photography, videography, style guides, and more. This will include your website design and development as well as other digital assets.

Our comprehensive services listed below focus on both your foundational pieces and your growth tactics.

The key to our success is not just enhancing your brand or building a beautiful, high-performing website. These things are very important, but we go further than that.

[Contact Us](https://advancemedia.com/contact/)

## Our **Services**

We want to understand your business model, your growth goals, and your unique selling propositions to create a detailed action plan for growth.

The goal is to bridge the gap between the number of consultations and patients you currently have and where you would like to be. This approach ensures we are not just focused on clicks and leads, but also on consultations, new patients, revenue, ROI, and referrals.

[Branding & Design](https://advancemedia.com/services/branding-and-design/) [Digital Advertising](https://advancemedia.com/services/digital-advertising/) [SMS/MMS Marketing](https://advancemedia.com/blog/email-marketing/) [Video/Photo Production](https://advancemedia.com/services/video-and-photoshoot/) [SEO](https://advancemedia.com/services/seo/) [Social Media Marketing](https://advancemedia.com/services/social-media-marketing/) [Website Development](https://advancemedia.com/services/website-development/) [Email Marketing](https://advancemedia.com/services/email-text-message-marketing/) [Technology](https://advancemedia.com/services/our-technology/) [GMB Optimization](https://advancemedia.com/services/gmb-optimization/) [**AI Visibility**, AEO & GEO](https://advancemedia.com/services/ai-visibility-aeo-geo/)

## Here are a few of the marketing and advertising growth tactics we utilize to help generate leads and consultations:

- Google and Bing Search Ads
- Paid Social Ads (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok)
- YouTube Ads
- Google Display Ads
- Native Ads

- SEO (Search Engine Optimization)
- CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization)
- Email and Text Message Marketing Campaigns
- Social Media Marketing
- And much more…

* * *

## The **Ideal** Client

We work with longevity practices of all sizes. While we can help most practices grow, not all practices are a good fit.

Who is a Good Fit

Practices that are open to new ideas, communicate well, can take direction, want to invest in their growth, and can help track their leads are a good fit.

Who May Not Be a Good Fit

Practices who work with multiple digital marketing agencies and want each one to oversee one specific tactic are generally not a good fit. Additionally, practices that are hyper-focused on ancillary metrics as opposed to bottom-line metrics that pertain to practice growth are not a good fit.

Practices who do not involve decision-makers in communication, are unwilling to put in the effort to track leads, or simply do not want to invest in their advertising, are not a good fit.

## Take the **Next Step**

ADvance Media is the leading advertising agency for longevity clinics. If you’d like to take your practice to the next level, we would love the opportunity to learn more about your vision and goals. To request a free CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) analysis please fill out the form here.

[Reach Out to Us](https://advancemedia.com/contact/)

## How We Are **Different**

While our tactics are relatively consistent with other industry leaders, our strategies set us apart from other agencies. These strategies are fueled by our experience, expertise, data, and technology.

Industry Knowledge & Expertise

The ADvance Media team understands elective medicine. We’ve worked with hundreds or cash-pay practices, including refractive surgeons, plastic surgeons, and cosmetic dermatologists. We have well over a decade of experience working with these types of practices which has led to in-depth knowledge of the ever-evolving industry landscape, the technology, and the psychology of prospective patients.

We have run thousands of different advertising experiments to better understand which ad headlines, creatives, offers, and landing pages work best for each type of prospective patient based on where they are in the research phase or marketing funnel, and what treatment(s) they are a candidate for.

This knowledge and expertise help us quickly generate results since there is no industry learning curve.

A Proven Track Record

In addition to our years of marketing and advertising for elective practices, ADvance also partnered with Allergan, Zeiss SMILE, Cutera, Sciton, and Alma Lasers. Our track record for generating practice growth has helped us work with some of the biggest technology and medical device corporations in the industry.

The Data and Technology

Our HIPAA-compliant marketing and sales CRM software, ADvance Leads, helps practices clearly identify and track opportunities and gaps within their marketing and sales funnels. With automation, we can ensure more of these opportunities are converted into sales.

Additionally, the reporting within the software provides total transparency so you can clearly see how much you are investing, how much revenue you are generating, and what your ROI is.

Transparent Reporting

Growth is our primary objective, and in order to track growth we need detailed, transparent reporting. The tracking, data, and technology we use allows us to clearly see the ROI generated from every campaign in our reports.

Additionally, our reporting provides insight into more than just your practice’s ROI. We can spot roadblocks in your sales funnel and work together to make advertising or operational adjustments to ensure more quality leads are converted to consultations and more consultations are being converted to patients.

Best-in-Class Customer Service

We are dedicated to providing best-in-class customer service. You will have a dedicated account manager that will help on-board you, provide you with a weekly summary of what is going on, and keep you aware of anything that we need from you. We respond quickly to our client’s requests and we are proactive about deliverables, new ideas, opportunities, and gaps.

* * *

Meet with us to get a clear, unbiased view of your marketing, advertising, and strategy. Request a meeting today.
